problems.title: Detect Cycle in an Undirected Graph
problems.description: Given an undirected graph with V vertices and E edges, check whether it contains any cycle or not. Your function should return true if a cycle exists, else false.

problems.title: Minimum Spanning Tree (Kruskal's)
problems.description: Given a weighted, undirected and connected graph of V vertices and E edges. The task is to find the sum of weights of the edges of the Minimum Spanning Tree.
problems.compilerOutput:
